title: Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Vijayawada location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited:
Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited!
